output.sparql:
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?person ?personLabel WHERE {
  ?person p:P166 ?statement .
  VALUES ?awardCategory {
    wd:Q19839210 wd:Q19839211 wd:Q19839213
  }
  ?statement ps:P166 ?awardCategory .
  ?statement pq:P1686 wd:Q19873404 .
  ?person rdfs:label ?personLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?personLabel) = "en")
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?person ?personLabel
WHERE {
  {
    ?person p:P166 ?statement .
    ?statement ps:P166 wd:Q19839211 .  # Golden Globe for Best Actress
    ?statement pq:P976 wd:Q19873404 .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?person p:P166 ?statement .
    ?statement ps:P166 wd:Q19839210 .  # Golden Globe for Best Actor
    ?statement pq:P976 wd:Q19873404 .
  }
  ?person rdfs:label ?personLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?personLabel) = "en")
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

}
args.answer: Nicole Kidman, Alexander Skarsgård, and Laura Dern received Golden Globe Awards for their roles in Big Little Lies. Nicole Kidman won Best Actress, Alexander Skarsgård won Best Actor, and Laura Dern won Best Supporting Actress in a Limited Series.
